entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A technology option promoting sustainable farming practices to increase yields in smallholder areas

entities.description: The country where conservation agriculture practices and challenges are being assessed

entities.description: The agricultural productivity of crops, which can be increased by conservation agriculture

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants grown by farmers using conservation agriculture

entities.description: Farmers with limited access to resources who utilize conservation agriculture

entities.description: Environmental areas with low rainfall where conservation agriculture is promoted

entities.name: INPUT LEVELS

entities.name: FARM HOUSEHOLD EXPERIENCE
entities.description: The level of experience of the farming family, affecting the yield gains of conservation agriculture

entities.name: DEMONSTRATIONS AND TRAINING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Educational initiatives that support the spontaneous adoption of conservation agriculture

entities.name: SUB SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The region where the adoption of conservation agriculture is influenced by socio economic conditions

entities.name: SOCIO ECONOMIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: The social and economic factors that can limit the adoption of conservation agriculture in sub Saharan Africa

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY

entities.name: HERBICIDES AND FERTILIZERS

entities.name: ADOPTION TRENDS
entities.description: The patterns and rates at which conservation agriculture principles and practices are adopted

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC IMPACTS

entities.name: VULNERABLE FARM HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Farm households that are susceptible to poverty and food insecurity
